---
title: ✏️ Welcome to Puri's Blog
comments: false
listing:
  - id: entries
    contents: entries
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
    
    categories: true
    # sort-ui: [date, author]
    filter-ui: [title, date, author]
    feed: true
    type: default
    page-size: 5
    image-align: left
    date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
    fields: [title, subtitle, author, description, date, image, reading-time]

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

:::{#entries}
:::

Here you can experience my various ventures into learning, as well as read about other various useful tid-bits.
